brand_identity.name: Aura Cosmetics
brand_identity.description: Premium cosmetics and skincare brand balancing nature with luxury.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light

storefront.container_style: Flat Solid or Crystal Glass for floating elements. Maximum image height 80vh on mobile.

dashboard.container_style: Flat Solid with 1px border (#E7E5E4) and rounded-lg or rounded-xl (max 8px). Avoid heavy shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C25E3E] text-white hover:bg-[#A64D32] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-none font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1C1917] text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#F5F5F4] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-none

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#E7E5E4] focus:border-[#C25E3E] rounded-none outline-none focus:ring-0 placeholder-stone-400 text-stone-900

navigation.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 sticky top-0 z-50
navigation.desktop: Visible links. No hamburger on desktop.

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: Always explicit. hover:text-white/brand, hover:-translate-y-1 for cards.
accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: Higher contrast focus rings. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C25E3E]
accessibility_and_interactions.animations: Subtle fade-in on scroll, smooth state transitions. transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease
accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based)

hero_image.description: Shampoo bottle partially submerged in water, clean organic feel.

product_1.description: Clear glass perfume bottle with silver cap

product_2.description: Gel facial cleanser on orange background

product_3.description: Flat lay of skincare bottles and jars with stones

lifestyle_2.description: Close-up of a woman applying face cream

brand_logo.description: Using a face aesthetic as an abstract avatar or hero background if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a comprehensive cosmetics e-commerce platform with multi-role dashboards (Client Storefront, Worker Panel, Director Panel, Admin Panel). Adhere strictly to the defined Theme and Archetype. Use raw .js files, not .tsx files.
instructions_to_main_agent.storefront: Create a high-impact, premium storefront. Use generous spacing, elegant typography (Cormorant Garamond for headings), and large, high-quality imagery. The order modal should collect email, name, phone, and geolocation.
instructions_to_main_agent.worker_dashboard: Provide a clean interface for workers to clock in/out (capturing geolocation and time). Show only their own sales history. Include a section for 30-day consultation reminders for past clients.
instructions_to_main_agent.director_dashboard: Show all accounts, complete sales history, statistics charts, and a map with customer locations. Include a view for worker attendance with late/early visual indicators.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_dashboard: Standard CRUD for products, news/blog, and viewing customer questions.
instructions_to_main_agent.audio_notifications: Ensure the system can trigger browser audio notifications for new orders and early/late clock-ins.
instructions_to_main_agent.multilingual: Implement UZ/RU/EN switcher in the header.
instructions_to_main_agent.shadcn_customization: Heavily customize Shadcn components for the storefront to avoid the 'Vercel-look'. For dashboards, maintain functional clarity but soften the aesthetic (max 8px border-radius, warm background).
